sleep_schedule.label: Sleep Schedule
questions: Do you naturally wake up early in the morning?
I prefer going to bed before 10 PM most nights.
My productivity peaks in the early morning hours.
I often stay up past midnight by habit.
I feel energized after 8 hours of sleep.

cleanliness.label: Cleanliness
questions: I clean shared spaces immediately after using them.
Dirty dishes in the sink bother me significantly.
I maintain a strict weekly cleaning schedule.
I prefer minimalist, clutter-free living spaces.
Dust and dirt accumulation bothers me quickly.

noise_tolerance.label: Noise Tolerance
questions: I need complete silence to focus or sleep.
Movie nights with roommates are my ideal evening.
Background noise while working is extremely distracting.
I enjoy spontaneous music or people talking around me.
Late-night conversations or TV don't bother me.

cooking_frequency.label: Cooking Frequency
questions: I cook full meals at home at least 4 times per week.
Cooking relaxes me and I enjoy experimenting with recipes.
I prefer ordering takeout rather than cooking.
I meal prep for the entire week on Sundays.
The kitchen is where I spend most time at home.

guest_frequency.label: Guest Frequency
questions: I love having friends visit my home regularly.
Hosting overnight guests energizes me.
I prefer keeping my home space private most of the time.
Surprise visitors make me uncomfortable.
I organize frequent gatherings and parties at home.

workout_habit.label: Workout Habit
questions: I work out at least 4 times per week.
Morning gym sessions are part of my daily routine.
I'm very disciplined about maintaining fitness.
Physical activity is not a priority for me.
I maintain an active lifestyle year-round.

introversion_extroversion.label: Introversion / Extroversion
questions: I recharge after a long day by spending time alone.
I love meeting new people and making connections.
Social gatherings energize me significantly.
Large parties make me anxious or overwhelmed.
I'm comfortable being the center of attention.

communication_style.label: Communication Style
questions: I directly address issues when they arise.
I prefer blunt, honest feedback over hints.
I communicate my boundaries clearly and openly.
I tend to avoid difficult conversations.
I express my feelings openly with roommates.

conflict_resolution.label: Conflict Resolution
questions: I address conflicts immediately when they occur.
I need time to cool off before discussing disagreements.
I'm willing to compromise during conflicts.
I revisit unresolved tensions regularly.
I prefer a structured, rule-based approach to resolving disputes.

social_battery.label: Social Battery
questions: I need significant alone time each day to recharge.
I enjoy spontaneous social interactions at home.
Frequent roommate interaction would drain my energy.
I love sharing meals and conversations daily.
Too much social time makes me irritable.
